name: HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ terms and conditions
milestoneBenefits: Gift voucher worth Rs 500 on spends of Rs 50,000 per calendar quarter
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 50,000 or more in a year before renewal date
additionalBenefits: 10X CashPoints, up to 3.3% valueback, on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Reliance Smart SuperStore and BigBasket
2 CashPoints per Rs 150 spent on other spends
Pay joining membership fee and get 500 reward points
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
CashPoints can be used for travel redemptions like flight and hotel bookings via SmartBuy
10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
Zero lost card liability when reported immediately

salaried: Net monthly income greater than Rs 20,000
selfEmployed: ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh per annum
